A story that started quietly… and turned into forever

❧

Senior Supervisor & Gicchhi · Est. Niftel Communication

Chapter by Chapter

Our Story

Chapter 01
The Beginning
A new job. A new place. Unfamiliar faces everywhere. And then there was him — calm, confident, a little distant. A senior. The moment she saw him, something inexplicable stirred inside. She didn't know his story. She didn't know what this would turn into. But she knew… he wasn't going to be just another person.
Chapter 02
The Mystery Room Date
Without many friends around, she gathered a little courage and texted him — would he join her for a mystery room plan? He said yes. And just like that, their first date began. Simple, a little unexpected… but somehow it felt like something had quietly started, without either of them even realizing it.
Chapter 03
Something More
Small conversations grew into something they looked forward to every single day. Random chats at work became sharing things they wouldn't tell anyone else. Somewhere between those moments, they stopped being just colleagues. Without any grand confession… they both simply knew. They had fallen into something real.
Chapter 04
Us
There was no dramatic proposal. No perfect movie moment. Just comfort, understanding, and a feeling that stayed. One day they simply said it out loud. They were together — not just in words, but in everything they did after that.
Chapter 05
A Life Together
What followed didn't feel rushed — it felt right. They started building a life together, learning each other beyond the good days. Shared space. Shared routines. Quiet moments after long days. And somehow, even the ordinary felt extraordinary.
Chapter 06
Two Families, One Story
The biggest step wasn't just theirs — it was bringing their worlds together. They introduced each other to their families, not knowing how it would go. But their families saw what they already knew. And they said yes. Not just to them… but to everything they were building together.
Chapter 07
The Next Chapter
And now, here they are. Still the same two people who met at a new workplace, in a moment that didn't seem important back then. But it changed everything. Planning a wedding next year — not just as a celebration, but as the beginning of forever.

Moments We Cherish

Favourite Memories

🔐
The Mystery Room
Their first ever plan together — a mystery room. It took courage to ask, and a simple "yes" to start it all. What felt like just an outing became the beginning of their whole story.
☕
First Conversations
Those early chats at work — small, casual, nothing special on the surface. But they were the threads that quietly stitched two hearts together, one conversation at a time.
🏠
Moving In Together
Sharing the same space, the same morning routines, the same quiet evenings. The moment the ordinary became extraordinary — just because they were doing it together.
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
Meeting the Families
Two different worlds coming together, hearts racing, hoping for acceptance. And their families looked at them and said yes — to them, and to everything they were building.
💍
Planning Forever
Sitting together, dreaming out loud about a wedding — not as a distant idea, but as something real and near. From a workplace hallway to planning forever. Their story, still being written.
